wf_workflow_version.description: This workflow pulls the list of routes for a routing template and creates a runtime route list based on the definition. Once the runtime routes are created, this workflow calls another workflow to process the routes.
wf_workflow_version.name: Discover Process Template
wf_workflow_version.on_cancel: // This script executes if the workflow is cancelled.// The global variable context_sys_id contains the sys_id of the cancelled workflow context.

wf_workflow.description: This workflow pulls the list of routes for a routing template and creates a runtime route list based on the definition. Once the runtime routes are created, this workflow calls another workflow to process the routes.
wf_workflow.name: Discover Process Template

wf_activity.name: Get Count of Top Tasker Definitions

activity.display_value: Get Count of Top Tasker Definitions

wf_activity.name: Template and Top Template Task are Active

activity.display_value: Template and Top Template Task are Active
Template and Top Template Task are Active
